summary: Session 28 (4/7) Visual Verification testing complete. ALL 382 TESTS PASSING (360 from Session 27 + 22 new screenshot-verify tests). Verified new screenshot-verify.js module exports (pickInspectionFiles, buildVerifyRequest, parseVerifyResult, verifyBuild, formatVerifyForRepairPrompt), SSE wiring in message-stream.js (Step 5c at lines 4005-4035), stream-client.js screenshot_verify case (line 102), stream-handler.js accumulator (line 201), useDashboardStream.js onScreenshotVerify handler (lines 534-548), BriefProgressCard screenshotVerify prop pass-through (lines 23, 290), and BuildObservatoryPanel Vision verify section with data-testid attributes. App loads correctly (Emanator login page with Aurora background).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 28 complete. Visual verification layer added for reference image comparison. Key files: lib/ai/screenshot-verify.js (pickInspectionFiles, buildVerifyRequest, parseVerifyResult, verifyBuild, formatVerifyForRepairPrompt), lib/ai/message-stream.js (Step 5c at lines 4005-4035), lib/stream-client.js (line 102), lib/api/stream-handler.js (line 201), components/dashboard/useDashboardStream.js (lines 534-548), components/dashboard/BriefProgressCard.jsx (lines 23, 290), components/dashboard/BuildObservatoryPanel.jsx (lines 49-57, 160-189). Jest suite now at 382/382 tests across 23 files. The verifyBuild orchestrator is non-blocking by design — provider errors or empty inputs return null silently. Session 29 will consume the structured {matches, findings[]} to drive N-round self-correction repair loop.

buildVerifyRequest preserves pre-formed data URIs without re-prefixing
parseVerifyResult returns null for unparseable input
parseVerifyResult accepts well-formed JSON response
parseVerifyResult accepts object directly (not string)
parseVerifyResult coerces invalid categories to 'other'
parseVerifyResult clamps findings to 6 max
parseVerifyResult defaults confidence to 0.5 when missing/out-of-range
parseVerifyResult filters findings with empty/missing issue text
verifyBuild returns null when no inspection files available
verifyBuild returns null when no reference images

formatVerifyForRepairPrompt groups findings per file
